main.description: A free-form entry in a workflow's event stream (ADR-0011), published on msg.workflow.<id>.events. The coordinator emits step/status transitions for observability; a dispatched agent emits its own step-done signal here, which the coordinator records into the (single-writer) state envelope.

step.description: The step id this event concerns (omitted for whole-workflow events).

status.description: The status being reported, e.g. running | done | failed for a step, or the workflow's own status.

by.description: Who emitted it (e.g. a dispatched agent's id for a step-done signal). The bus-stamped author is authoritative; this is a convenience label.
